name: Sin'dorei Swarmer
description:
A mixture of crimson and cerulean scales adorns this nimble fish. A common fish in Eversong Woods, the Sin'dorei Swarmer travels and interacts with the waters in accordance to the school it's a part of.

Special: 

 Chum

Throw the fish back into the water to gain 25 Midnight Fishing for 30 sec.

Throwing multiple fish can extend this buff up to 5 min.

Areas you can find this fish:
- Eversong Woods
- Zul'Aman

Fishing Pools:
- Bubbling Bloom
- Sunwell Swarm
- Surface Ripple
